typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	AuditPkgSK as integer (),
	AuditTableSK as integer (),
	AuditTableSK2 as integer (),
	AuditTableSK3 as integer (),
	BCPFileName as string (),
	BCPFileSharePath as string (),
	EmailFailuresTo as string (),
	EmailFrom as string (),
	EmailNotificationsTo as string (),
	ErrCount as integer (),
	ESP_Event_Nm as string (),
	ESP_Job_Nm as string (),
	FileTaskDestination as string (),
	FileTaskSource as string (),
	InsCount as integer (),
	SrcCount as integer (),
	SSISLogFileName as string (),
	SSISLogFolder as string (),
	SSISLogFolderPath as string (),
	TotCount as integer (),
	UpdType1Count as integer (),
	UpdType2Count as integer ()
}

source(output(
		LOC_ID as short,
		SKU as integer,
		TYPE_CD as string,
		DT_ENT as timestamp,
		TM_ENT as string,
		SELLABLE_QTY as integer,
		ROOT_CAUSE as string,
		PUTAWAY_FLG as string,
		DESCR as string,
		AISLE_BIN_LOC as string,
		ABC_CLASS as string,
		REPLEN_TYPE_CD as string,
		REPLEN_SUB_TYPE_CD as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT S.*, I.descr, A.AISLE_BIN_LOC, A.ABC_CLASS, A.Replen_Type_CD, A.Replen_Sub_Type_CD 	from OD.SCANOUT S, OD.ITEM I, OD.ITEMLOC A 	Where S.dt_ent = CURRENT_DATE - 1 days and 	S.SKU = I.SKU 	AND S.SKU = A.SKU 	AND S.LOC_ID = A.LOC_ID WITH UR',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> db2scanout
db2scanout derive(LOC_ID = LOC_ID) ~> PlaceHolderRowCount
PlaceHolderRowCount sink(input(
		ABC_CLASS as string,
		TM_ENT as string,
		DT_ENT as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		PUTAWAY_FLG as string,
		AISLE_BIN_LOC as string,
		REPLEN_SUB_TYPE_CD as string,
		SELLABLE_QTY as integer,
		LOC_ID as short,
		TYPE_CD as string,
		ROOT_CAUSE as string,
		REPLEN_TYPE_CD as string,
		SKU as integer,
		DESCR as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		ABC_CLASS,
		TM_ENT,
		DT_ENT,
		PUTAWAY_FLG,
		AISLE_BIN_LOC,
		REPLEN_SUB_TYPE_CD,
		SELLABLE_QTY,
		LOC_ID,
		TYPE_CD,
		ROOT_CAUSE,
		REPLEN_TYPE_CD,
		SKU,
		DESCR)) ~> Loaddb2scanout
